Free Online Tool

Locker Room Planner

Plan your perfect locker room in three simple steps. No account required. Just enter your room dimensions, add lockers, and request a quote when you're done.

1 Enter your room size
→
2 Add & arrange lockers
→
3 Review & send to us
Step 1

Room Dimensions

Measure your locker room and enter the length of each wall below. If a wall has a door or window, click the button under that wall to mark it so lockers won't be placed in those areas.

Timeline helps us prioritize production. Funding helps us tailor your quote and payment options.

Wall A (top)
ft in
Wall B (right)
ft in
Wall C (bottom)
ft in
Wall D (left)
ft in
Step 2

Add Lockers

Pick a locker model, choose your size, color, and any accessories. Set the quantity and click Add. They'll appear on the layout below where you can drag them into position.

100%
Corner Clearance
30″
Adjacent walls When lockers sit on two connecting walls (e.g. A + B), a 30″ clearance is auto-reserved at the corner.
✓
Single wall No clearance needed — the full wall length is available for lockers.

Layers

This panel lists every item in your room: walls, doors, windows, and lockers. Click any item to select it on the canvas, then you can edit its size, color, or position. As you add lockers they will appear here.

Selection
$0
″
″
″
″
″
◎ Click on the wall to place
⊞
Your layout will appear here
Enter your room dimensions above and click Draw My Room to create the walls. Then add lockers. You can drag them around the canvas, double-click to rotate, and they'll snap together automatically.
3D Preview
Locker Colors
Cushion Colors
4″ Base
Edgebanding
Depth
Width
Accessories
Floor Color
Wall Color
ROOM 1 OF 1
Step 3

Review Your Layout

You've turned ideas into a real layout across your rooms. We've attached two PDFs: a polished project estimate with full line-by-line pricing, and a share-ready layout pack with floor plans and 3D views for donors, leadership, or your next meeting. We're thrilled to pick up from here with you and help turn this plan into the locker room your team deserves.

Order Summary

Product Qty Subtotal
No lockers placed yet. Add lockers above to see your order here.
Subtotal $0.00
Estimated Total $0.00
0 lockers

Shipping isn't included in this estimate.

We'll add shipping to your final order once we've agreed on everything with you.

We'll send a copy of your layout to your email and to our team so we can help you execute on your dream locker room.
